response.justification: Experienced full-stack engineer with roughly 15 years of varied software work and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but the resume lacks the AI/ML depth, recognized AI products, or director-level strategic leadership the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role requires. Background is primarily product engineering rather than cloud/AI platform strategy at scale.
strengths: Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Founder experience and community teaching demonstrate initiative
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML platform or product expertise at scale
No evidence of director-level IC influence or advising strategic customers
Limited cloud-platform strategy work; mostly application engineering
